mapper.select: /* PoB2bDaysObQtyMapper.xml selectErpPoB2bDaysObQtyList */ SELECT TRN_ID , CTKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , AVQTY , PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY FROM ( SELECT TRN_ID , CTKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , AVQTY , PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY , DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TRN_ID DESC) TRN_RK FROM TORDER_EAI_B2BAVGOBQTY_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- AND SND_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY TRN_ID , CTKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , AVQTY , PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY ORDER BY TRN_ID ) WHERE TRN_RK = 1
